text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"On full display at the Arima is Nakayama
Racecourse's trademark..."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, "trademark"? Like that little "r" in the circle
thingy?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it has another meaning! Huh, learn something
new every day.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh man... I'm just too dumb, huh? Seriously...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...If only I could understand all your strategies,
maybe I'd be a stronger runner.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I did good in the Copa Republica Argentina. I can
do this too! I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: All right, Jordan cheer squad! Let's hear it!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hoo, look at them over there, all excited.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I don't know if I could survive embarrassing myself in front of them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, just gotta do my best! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know. I actually read up on the course, I'll have
you know. Plus, you saw how I ran last time, didn't
you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I got this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the year-end dream race at
Nakayama. Who will it be shining atop the throne
of this year's grand prix?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I really can do it. I've come this far,
haven't I?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The stands are packed with fans barely able to
wait for the race, a contest of runners heralded as
the strongest of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They'll be making their way to the paddock soon!
Let's give them a warm welcome!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Get it, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! I see you! Thanks for coming!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Now that I think about it, the Satsuki Sho is a G1
race too, isn't it? And it's not like this is my first
time going up against seniors...)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Kyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here they are! They're finally here! The strongest
Umamusume of the generation are here!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Wha?! Ow, my ears...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Unmatched in the mile, and here to show us even
more miracles... it's Fuji Kiseki the entertainer!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A beautiful flower in bloom, with the pride of her
blood on the line! It's Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully she makes it out of the gate safely this
year. Could she be the one to defeat the front
runner? It's Zenno Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What's this?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh. "The Umamusume to Watch This Arima
Kinen!" Okay, why did they have to make the
picture so huge? Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Air Groove. And Fuji. Ooh, and Rob Roy's
racewear is so cute.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But like, I've seen all of them. I mean, obviously.
We go to the same school.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, I've seen them train, way more than whoever
wrote this has. Well, I guess that's magazines for
you. Always overhyping things.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Who are they?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
They're nothing like the girls at school I know.
Where did that... that aura come from?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will we be taken on a dream journey, or whisked
away to an unseen vista? Who will be hailed as
the strongest runner of all?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Here come Mejiro McQueen and Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: They look... invincible...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I don't understand. Why are my legs shaking?)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(I don't get it, I don't get it. I don't get it, I don't
get it, I don't get it!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I have no choice! I want to win!
